name: Full campaign creation
expected: Skill triggers and generates all fields (name, objective, businessGoal, goalType, dates, KPIs)

name: Full creation with details
prompt: Create a 2026 sneaker campaign for Nike
expected: Populates all fields derived from the request, including brand context and product focus

name: Partial update - single field
prompt: Change the campaign name to Summer Sale
expected: Returns only {"name": "Summer Sale"}, omits all other fields

name: Partial update - multiple fields
prompt: Set the start date to March 1st and end date to March 31st

name: Partial update - business goal change
prompt: Change the business goal to focus on retention
expected: Returns businessGoal, goalType (retention), primaryKpi (CLV), secondaryKpis aligned with retention

name: Clarification - ambiguous request
expected: Asks clarifying question: 'Which aspect would you like to improve?' - no JSON output

name: Clarification - missing details
expected: Asks: 'What start and end dates would you like?' - no JSON output

name: Creation trigger phrase (tests updated description)
expected: Skill triggers and creates campaign with Q2 dates (Apr-Jun)

name: User override of good value
expected: Honors user request and returns {"objective": "Boost sales"} even if current value is good

name: Multiple field update
prompt: Change the goal to engagement and set the KPI to pages per session
expected: Returns goalType, primaryKpi, and appropriate secondaryKpis for engagement goal

name: Edge case - no page context
expected: Skill should NOT trigger (page context required)
